# Teleconference MCP — LLM Full Reference

## Overview
Self-hosted AI-powered video conferencing platform with LiveKit WebRTC, voice agent, and remote desktop control. 30+ MCP tools across scheduling, room management, meeting intelligence, diagnostics, and inter-agent signaling.

## Quick Start
```bash
uv sync --dev
uv run teleconference-mcp conferencing   # Start MCP server (port 10720)
cd apps/web && npm ci && npm run dev     # Start dashboard (port 10886)
```

Stack: Python 3.12+, FastMCP 3.4+, Next.js 16, LiveKit 1.12, Turborepo, Ruff lint.

## Architecture
- `teleconference_mcp/` — Entry point + shared health utilities
- `apps/web/` — Next.js 16 dashboard (port 10886)
- `apps/agent/` — LiveKit voice agent pipeline (Silero VAD → Whisper → Ollama → Piper TTS)
- `packages/conferencing_mcp/` — 25 MCP tools (conferences, rooms, intelligence, diagnostics, signaling)
- `packages/remoting_mcp/` — 8 MCP tools (screen capture, mouse/keyboard, join/leave meetings)
- `tests/` — 95 pytest tests (68 conferencing + 27 agent)
- `native/` — Tauri 2.0 NSIS wrapper (untracked, in progress)

## Ports
| Service | Port |
|---------|------|
| Web dashboard | 10886 |
| Conferencing MCP | 10720 |
| Health/Diagnostics | 10721 |
| Remoting MCP | 10725 |
| AI Agent | 10887 |
| LiveKit WS | 15580 |
| LiveKit WebRTC | 15581 |
| LiveKit UDP | 15582 |
| Redis (Docker) | 16379 |
| Grafana | 13000 |
| Loki | 13100 |
| Prometheus | 19090 |

## MCP Tools

### Conferences (9 tools)
- `conference_schedule(title, scheduled_at, organizer, ...)` — Schedule a conference
- `conference_get(conference_id)` — Fetch single conference
- `conference_list(status, after, before, limit)` — List with filters
- `conference_update(conference_id, ...)` — Update mutable fields
- `conference_cancel(conference_id)` — Cancel scheduled conference
- `conference_upcoming(days)` — List upcoming conferences
- `participant_invite(conference_id, identity, role)` — Invite participant
- `participant_list_invited(conference_id)` — List invited participants
- `participant_remove_invited(conference_id, identity)` — Remove invitation

### Rooms (8 tools)
- `room_create(name, max_participants, empty_timeout, metadata)` — Create LiveKit room
- `room_list(filter_names)` — List active rooms
- `room_delete(name)` — Delete room (kicks all participants)
- `room_update_metadata(name, metadata)` — Update room metadata
- `room_participant_list(room_name)` — List live participants
- `room_participant_kick(room_name, identity)` — Kick participant
- `room_participant_mute(room_name, identity, track_sid, muted)` — Mute/unmute track
- `room_send_data(room_name, data, destination_identities)` — Send data message

### Intelligence (3 tools)
- `generate_meeting_summary(room_name, transcript)` — Summarize transcript with LLM, persist to LanceDB
- `extract_action_items(room_name, transcript)` — Extract action items, persist to LanceDB
- `set_translation_language(language)` — Set live translation target

### Diagnostics (7 tools)
- `get_dev_stats()` — Git/disk local dev stats
- `query_system_logs(pattern, limit)` — Windows Event Log search
- `sample_log_analysis(pattern, iterations)` — Iterative log sampling
- `get_substrate_heartbeat()` — LiveKit + Ollama + system health
- `orchestrate_industrial_diagnostics()` — Full diagnostic pass
- `orchestrate_remote_support(action)` — RustDesk remote support
- `sample_system_forensics(anomaly)` — LLM forensics analysis

### Signaling (3 tools)
- `list_active_conferences()` — LiveKit rooms + scheduled conferences
- `notify_conference_active(room_id, participant_count)` — Inter-agent signal
- `inter_agent_ping(target_agent)` — Heartbeat broadcast

## Environment Variables
| Variable | Default | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| `LIVEKIT_API_KEY` | — | LiveKit API key |
| `LIVEKIT_API_SECRET` | — | LiveKit API secret |
| `LIVEKIT_URL` | `ws://localhost:15580` | LiveKit server URL |
| `MCP_PORT` | `10720` | HTTP transport port |
| `MCP_HOST` | `127.0.0.1` | HTTP transport host |
| `MCP_BRIDGE_URLS` | — | Comma-separated MCP proxy URLs |
| `TELECONFERENCE_TAURI` | — | Set by Tauri wrapper |
| `FASTMCP_LOG_LEVEL` | `WARNING` | Log level for FastMCP |
| `OLLAMA_HOST` | `http://localhost:11434` | Ollama server URL |
| `AUTH_DISABLED` | — | Set to `true` to skip OIDC auth |
| `AUTHENTIK_URL` | — | Authentik OIDC issuer |
| `AUTH_SECRET` | — | NextAuth secret |

## External Dependencies
- **LiveKit** (v1.12+): WebRTC SFU server for real-time video/audio
- **Ollama** (optional): Local LLM for meeting intelligence (ctx.sample)
- **RustDesk** (optional): Remote desktop support
- **Redis** (optional): Agent state bus
- **Authentik** (optional): OIDC authentication

## Testing
```bash
uv run pytest tests/          # 68 conferencing tests
uv run pytest apps/agent/tests/  # 27 agent tests
uv run ruff check             # SOTA 2026 lint (120-char, double quotes)
```

All tools use Annotated[Field()] parameters, ## Return Format, ## Examples in docstrings.

## Troubleshooting
- **"LiveKit not reachable"**: Ensure livekit-server is running on port 15580
- **"Conference DB locked"**: Remove `packages/conferencing_mcp/conference.db` and restart
- **"Ollama not found"**: Install Ollama or set `OLLAMA_HOST` — tools degrade gracefully
- **"MCP server won't start on port 10720"**: Clear zombie: `Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 10720 | Stop-Process`
- **CI fails on Linux**: Windows-only deps (pywin32, pywinctl, pynput, mss) have `sys_platform == 'win32'` markers
